name: Sebastian Maniscalco
bio: Sebastian Maniscalco is an American stand-up comedian and actor known for a highly physical, exasperated style that mines Italian-American family life, marriage, and his bafflement at modern manners. He worked as a Beverly Hills waiter while developing his act and went on to release multiple specials and play supporting roles in films including Green Book and The Irishman. He co-wrote and starred in the 2023 film About My Father opposite Robert De Niro.

timeline.ev: Releases Showtime special Arent You Embarrassed?
Releases Netflix special Stay Hungry; appears in The Irishman
Hosts the MTV Video Music Awards
Co-writes and stars in About My Father

accolades: Supporting role in Best Picture winner Green Book (2018)
Host of the 2019 MTV Video Music Awards
